meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't deploy apps (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't deploy apps. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering Onboarding to Fix Deployment Blocks
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Learn how to implement user onboarding to validate your AI apps, fix deployment blockers, and launch with Antigravity and Claude.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure often stems from missing user feedback loops. By implementing a frictionless onboarding flow, you capture user intent early, validate your core value proposition, and gain the necessary data to debug infrastructure constraints. This approach transforms a technical deployment blocker into a strategic opportunity for product-market fit.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting your stack, fine-tuning your prompts, and polishing the UI, only to hit a brick wall the moment you try to push to production. The silence from your terminal isn't just a technical error; it's the barrier between a student project and a real-world application. Most beginners fail here, not because their code is broken, but because they haven't built a bridge for their users to cross.

True engineering isn't just about writing functions; it’s about managing the user's journey from their first click to their first success. When you integrate intelligent onboarding, you stop guessing why users aren't engaging and start solving the deployment bottleneck with purpose-driven data. Let’s turn your 'can't deploy' frustration into a launch-ready system.

steps.title: Define the User Intent Loop
steps.description: Identify the exact moment your user achieves their first 'aha' moment. We need to map this to your deployment environment to ensure the app is ready for traffic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my app structure and propose a 3-step onboarding flow that guides users to the core AI feature while capturing essential telemetry for deployment debugging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Analyze my codebase and suggest a user onboarding sequence that captures telemetry during the first run.'

steps.title: Build a Frictionless Welcome Component
steps.description: Create a lightweight welcome overlay that explains the app's value. This ensures users are ready before the backend resources are fully provisioned.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component for a welcome modal that explains the AI capabilities and includes a progress bar for the setup process.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Create a new onboarding modal component in src/components/Onboarding.tsx'

steps.title: Implement Progressive Data Collection
steps.description: Don't overwhelm the user. Collect only what is needed to initialize the AI model, reducing the initial load on your deployment environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a form schema that captures user preferences for AI model customization without increasing initial latency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'npm install react-hook-form zod' && claude /edit 'Update the onboarding flow to use the new hook-form schema'

steps.title: Configure Telemetry Hooks
steps.description: Tie your onboarding steps to logging events. This allows you to see exactly where users drop off, which is often where deployment issues manifest.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add logging middleware to the onboarding flow to track completion rates and identify potential server-side bottlenecks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Integrate logging into the onboarding submission handler to track user completion metrics'

steps.title: Automate Deployment Validation
steps.description: Use your new onboarding flow as a health check. If a user completes the onboarding, your deployment is officially validated.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment validation script that simulates the onboarding flow to verify backend connectivity.

pro_tips: Always use a 'skeleton screen' during onboarding to mask initial API latency.
Never ask for authentication before showing the value; let the user experience the AI first.
Use 'feature flagging' to test different onboarding flows without redeploying your entire application.
Log every failed onboarding attempt as a critical bug report; it’s the fastest way to find deployment issues.
Keep your onboarding logic decoupled from your main business logic to allow for rapid iteration.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, monitor your analytics for 48 hours. If you see drop-offs, use Claude Code to refactor the specific step causing the friction and redeploy.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student writing scripts; you are an AI builder architecting experiences. By mastering the onboarding flow, you have gained the control necessary to solve deployment blockers and scale your vision. The path from prototype to production is open. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
